seoTitle: Lake Alexandrina vs Lake Carlet — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Alexandrina and Lake Carlet. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Alexandrina vs Lake Carlet: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Alexandrina and Lake Carlet.
heading: Lake Alexandrina vs Lake Carlet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Alexandrina, South Australia and Lake Carlet, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Carlet has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lake Alexandrina (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Alexandrina or Lake Carlet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Alexandrina has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Lake Carlet scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Alexandrina scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Carlet scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Alexandrina or Lake Carlet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Carlet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
